---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement to the template
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the pain point. "I'm always frustrated when..." / "I keep having to..."

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like the template to do. Be concrete — a new slash command, a
new hook, a new agent, a doc change, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

**Scope check**
- [ ] This fits the "template for Claude Code workflows" scope
- [ ] This doesn't duplicate an existing command / agent / skill
- [ ] This would help more than just my specific project

**Anything else?**
Mockups, examples from other projects, links.
